name: zoxide
title: Zoxide
description: Fuzzy-jump to your frecent directories. Open in terminal, editor, or any program you wire up.
author: oxysoft

commands.name: add-directory
commands.title: Add Directory
commands.subtitle: zoxide
commands.description: Add a path to zoxide's database

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal Emulator
preferences.description: Terminal command to spawn (e.g. kitty, alacritty, wezterm, foot, gnome-terminal). Leave blank to autodetect.

preferences.name: editor
preferences.title: Editor Command
preferences.description: Editor command bound to ctrl+e. Set to '-' to disable the editor action entirely.

preferences.name: fileManager
preferences.title: File Manager Command
preferences.description: File manager command bound to ctrl+f.

preferences.name: program1Cmd
preferences.title: Program 1 Command
preferences.description: Custom program slot 1 — leave blank to disable. Bound to ctrl+1.

preferences.name: program1Label
preferences.title: Program 1 Label
preferences.description: Display label for program 1. Falls back to the command name if blank.

preferences.name: program2Cmd
preferences.title: Program 2 Command
preferences.description: Custom program slot 2 — leave blank to disable. Bound to ctrl+2.

preferences.name: program2Label
preferences.title: Program 2 Label
preferences.description: Display label for program 2. Falls back to the command name if blank.

preferences.name: program3Cmd
preferences.title: Program 3 Command
preferences.description: Custom program slot 3 — leave blank to disable. Bound to ctrl+3.

preferences.name: program3Label
preferences.title: Program 3 Label
preferences.description: Display label for program 3. Falls back to the command name if blank.

preferences.name: program4Cmd
preferences.title: Program 4 Command
preferences.description: Custom program slot 4 — leave blank to disable. Bound to ctrl+4.

preferences.name: program4Label
preferences.title: Program 4 Label
preferences.description: Display label for program 4. Falls back to the command name if blank.

preferences.name: program5Cmd
preferences.title: Program 5 Command
preferences.description: Custom program slot 5 — leave blank to disable. Bound to ctrl+5.

preferences.name: program5Label
preferences.title: Program 5 Label
preferences.description: Display label for program 5. Falls back to the command name if blank.

preferences.name: extraPath
preferences.title: Extra PATH
preferences.description: Colon-delimited PATH prefix used to locate the zoxide binary (e.g. /home/me/.local/bin).
